title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Lucknow - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Lucknow - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Lucknow. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Lucknow:
IIM Lucknow is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow!
